display_name.description: The display name for the application

identifier_uris.description: A list of user-defined URI(s) that uniquely identify an application within its Azure AD tenant

owners.description: A list of object IDs of principals that will be granted ownership of the application

sign_in_audience.description: The Microsoft account types that are supported for the current application

api.type: list(object({known_client_applications: list(string), mapped_claims_enabled: bool, requested_access_token_version: number, oauth2_permission_scope: list(object({admin_consent_description: string, admin_consent_display_name: string, id: string, enabled: bool, type: string, user_consent_description: string, user_consent_display_name: string}))}))

app_role.description: List of app roles to declare for the application

feature_tags.type: list(object({custom_single_sign_on: bool, enterpise: bool, gallery: bool, hide: bool}))
feature_tags.description: Feature tags configuration for the application

optional_claims.type: list(object({access_token: list(object({additional_properties: string, essential: bool, name: string, source: string})), id_token: list(object({additional_properties: string, essential: bool, name: string, source: string})), saml2_token: list(object({additional_properties: string, essential: bool, name: string, source: string}))}))
optional_claims.description: Optional claims configuration for the application

public_client.description: Public client configuration for the application

required_resource_access.description: List of required resource access for the application

web.type: list(object({homepage_url: string, logout_url: string, redirect_uris: list(string), implicit_grant: object({access_token_issuance_enabled: bool, id_token_issuance_enabled: bool})}))

group_membership_claims.description: Configures the groups claim issued in a user or OAuth 2.0 access token

fallback_public_client_enabled.description: Specifies whether the application is fallen back to public client

marketing_url.description: URL of the application's marketing page

notes.description: User-specified notes relevant for the management of the application

privacy_statement_url.description: URL of the application's privacy statement

service_management_reference.description: References application manager in a service management tool

support_url.description: URL of the application's support page

tags.description: A list of tags to apply to the application

template_id.description: Unique ID for a templated application in the Azure AD App Gallery

terms_of_service_url.description: URL of the application's terms of service statement
